title: Oblivion Protocol
overall_sentiment: Audience and critic reception for "Oblivion Protocol" has been broadly positive, with particular praise for its creative vision and technical achievements. The film has generated significant discussion across social media platforms and review aggregators, with audiences praising its ambition while some critics note areas where execution falls short of its considerable aspirations.
common_criticisms: Some plot holes in time travel logic
ai_verdict: A visually spectacular sci-fi that asks big questions about memory and identity, even if its ambitions occasionally exceed its reach.
